working_on.task: Plan created, ready to implement Phase 1 (Quick Links)
working_on.notes: PLAN-admin-employer-mgmt.md written. 4 phases: (1) FDIWork links, (2) Employer detail page, (3) Company page editor, (4) UX polish. No schema changes needed.

pending_tasks.task: Phase 1 — Add FDIWork links: Application table job title → /viec-lam/[slug], Moderation page job card → /viec-lam/[slug], Employers list → /cong-ty/[slug]
Phase 2 — Build /employers/[id] detail page with 3 tabs (Job Postings, Subscription, Info)
Phase 3 — Build /employers/[id]/edit form to edit company info (description, logo, website...)
Phase 4 — UX polish: move Link Client from employers list to detail page, tooltip, sidebar rename
Manual browser review of candidate detail tabs and candidate upload flow on real UI
Consider changing DATABASE_URL sslmode to verify-full to silence pg SSL warning

recent_changes.description: Fixed UTF-8 double-encoding mojibake in seed.ts Application records. Re-seeded DB.
Application Detail View: expandable rows in /moderation/applications showing 3-column panel (applicant info, job details, cover letter + CV download)

Option A Dashboard Polish: replaced hardcoded bg-white/text-gray-* with design tokens (bg-surface, text-foreground, text-muted), added empty state for jobs list, added ThemeToggle (dark/light mode button in header)
Fixed remaining triple-encoded Vietnamese text in seed.ts job posting data (Windows-1252 smart quotes). Re-seeded all 22 job postings and 2 applications.
Created PLAN-admin-employer-mgmt.md — full 4-phase plan for employer detail page, company page editor, and FDIWork quick links

decisions_made.decision: Keep Candidate.cvFileUrl and Candidate.cvFileName synchronized with the primary CandidateCV
decisions_made.reason: The old viewer and legacy flows can keep working while the new CandidateCV model rolls out

decisions_made.decision: Store languages in CandidateLanguage relation rows instead of a String[] field
decisions_made.reason: Language level and certificate must be stored alongside the language name

decisions_made.decision: Use CSS design tokens (bg-surface, text-foreground, text-muted) across all dashboard components
decisions_made.reason: Dark mode support requires semantic tokens, not hardcoded Tailwind color utilities like bg-white or text-gray-900

decisions_made.decision: Application detail view uses expandable table rows (not a modal or side drawer)
decisions_made.reason: Keeps admin flow in-page, consistent with the moderation queue UX, easier to scan across multiple applications

decisions_made.decision: Admin employer management: no schema changes needed — Employer model already has all required fields (slug, description, logo, website, etc.)
decisions_made.reason: Only UI + server actions need to be built. Simplifies the implementation scope significantly.

verification.notes: 22 job postings, 2 applications created with correct Vietnamese encoding
